name: Freezer Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Use cooked chicken or ground beef. In a pan, cook equal amounts of oil and flour (usually 4 tbsp each) with one chopped onion until brown.
2. Add 2 cups of chicken broth, stirring continuously. Keep adding broth until the mixture reaches a smooth consistency.
3. Stir in half a can of enchilada sauce and taste; add salt to taste.
4. Wrap about a dozen tortillas in a dish towel and microwave for 2 minutes.
5. Take one tortilla out of the microwave and place it in a greased casserole pan.
6. Add a little meat and roll the tortilla, placing it down in the cookie sheet. Continue this until the pan is full.
7. Cover the enchiladas with the sauce, then cover with grated Monterey Jack cheese.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
